qa_method.name: qa_detect.QADetector
qa_method.description: PCA-1 induced ordering + calibrated cmap permutation, E_QA = 1 - QCI scoring.
qa_method.observer_projection: quantile binning of tabular features onto (b,e) in {1..24}^2

calibration_provenance.procedure: quantile edges from training; cmap permutation chosen by max-QCI over 720 permutations on training transition triples
calibration_provenance.domain_of_origin: per-benchmark (recalibrated, not inherited from finance cert [154])

diffs: no temporal window (tabular has no intrinsic order)
PCA-1 induced ordering instead of calendar time
